name: Cranberry-Orange Salad Mold
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the lemon and unflavored gelatins separately.
2. Pour boiling water over the lemon gelatin; stir until fully dissolved.
3. Stir in the dry red wine.
4. Grate the peel of the orange and pare and section the orange. Place the orange sections and grated peel into a blender with the remaining ingredients.
5. Cover and puree the mixture until smooth.
6. Stir the orange puree into the lemon gelatin mixture; cool slightly.
7. Break up the cranberry sauce with a fork and stir it into the gelatin mixture.
8. Pour the mixture into six 2/3-cup molds.
9. Refrigerate until firm, at least 4 hours.
10. Unmold onto salad greens and serve with mayonnaise or salad dressing.
